scripts.auth-service:grpc:gen: node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('./services/auth-service/generated', {recursive:true})" && cd services/auth-service && uv run -m grpc_tools.protoc -I ../../docs/communication/grpc --python_out ./generated --grpc_python_out ./generated ../../docs/communication/grpc/auth.proto && uv run ./fix_grpc_imports.py
scripts.install:all: pnpm install && concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web,content-service,exam-engine" -c "green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm install" "cd services/auth-service && uv sync" "cd services/web && pnpm install" "cd services/content-service && pnpm install" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm install"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web,content-service,exam-engine,payment-service" -c "green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,red" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm start:dev" "cd services/auth-service && uv run ./dev.py" "cd services/web && pnpm dev" "cd services/content-service && pnpm start:dev" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm start:dev" "pnpm payment-service:dev"
scripts.payment-service:dev: concurrently -n "watch,run" -c "redBright,red" "cd services/payment-service && pnpx chokidar-cli \"src/main/java/**/*.java\" \"../../docs/communication/grpc/**/*.proto\" -c \"mvnw compile -o\"" "cd services/payment-service && mvnw spring-boot:run"
scripts.build: concurrently -n "api-gateway,web,content-service,exam-engine,payment-service" -c "green,magenta,yellow,blue,red" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm build" "cd services/web && pnpm build" "cd services/content-service && pnpm build" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm build" "cd services/payment-service && mvnw clean package"
scripts.start: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web,content-service,exam-engine,payment-service" -c "green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,red" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm start:prod" "cd services/auth-service && uv run ./main.py" "cd services/web && pnpm start" "cd services/content-service && pnpm start:prod" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm start:prod" "cd services/payment-service && java -jar ./target/payment-service-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar"
scripts.test: concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,content-service,exam-engine,payment-service" -c "green,cyan,yellow,blue,red" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm test" "cd services/auth-service && uv run pytest ." "cd services/content-service && pnpm test" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm test" "cd services/payment-service && mvnw test"
scripts.lint:format: prettier --write "**/*.{json,md,yml,yaml,css,java}" && concurrently -n "api-gateway,auth-service,web,content-service,exam-engine,payment-service" -c "green,cyan,magenta,yellow,blue,red" "cd services/api-gateway && pnpm lint" "cd services/auth-service && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format . && uv run mypy ." "cd services/web && pnpm lint" "cd services/content-service && pnpm lint" "cd services/exam-engine && pnpm lint"
scripts.openapi:gen: cd services/api-gateway && pnpm openapi:gen && cd ../web && pnpm openapi:gen
